versions.version_description: More accurate, more complete than other versions.
This version has accurate chording and has a link to a video for reference.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Take The Long Way Home chords
Supertramp  1979 (Breakfast In America) 

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Take_the_Long_Way_Home_(Supertramp_song)

Capo III *

[ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] \ [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] \ [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] \ [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  2x

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
So you think you're a Romeo,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Playing a part in a picture-show?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]            
Take the long way home[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]            
Take the long way home[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Cos you're the joke of the neighborhood[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
Why should you care if you're feeling good?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]            
Take the long way home[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]            
Take the long way home[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                                                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
But there are times that you feel you're part of the scenery[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
All the greenery, is coming down, boy[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C#m[/ch]
And then your wife seems to think you're part of the[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Furniture, oh it's peculiar, she used to be so nice.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
When lonely days turn to lonely nights,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
You take a trip to the city lights?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]           
And take the long way home[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]            
Take the long way home[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
You never see what you want to see,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
Forever playing to the gallery[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]           
You take the long way home[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]            
Take the long way home[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                                        [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
And when you re up on the stage, it's so unbelievable,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Unforgettable, how they adore you,[/tab]

[tab]                            [ch]C#m[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
But then your wife seems to think you're losing your sanity,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, calamity, is there no way out?[/tab]

[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] \ [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  2x

[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                                      [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
Does it feel that your life's become a catastrophe? [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, it has to be for you to grow, boy.[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C#m[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
When you look through the years and see what you could have been[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, what might have been, If you'd had more time.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
So, when the day comes to settle down,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
Who's to blame if you're not around? [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]            
You took the long way home[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]            
You took the long way home[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]            
You took the long way home[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]            
You took the long way home[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]            
You took the long way home[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]            
You took the long way home[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]            
You took the long way home[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]            
You took the long way home[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Aaaaaaaaaaaaah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Oooooooooooooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Aaaaaaaaaaaaah[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]           
Long way home, Long way home, long way home[/tab]

* Alternates:

Capo I

[ch]Am7[/ch]   = [ch]Bm7[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch]    = [ch]Bm[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]     = [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch]     = [ch]B[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]     = [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]C#m[/ch]   = [ch]Ebm[/ch]
[ch]F#m[/ch]   = [ch]Abm[/ch] ([ch]G#m[/ch])
[ch]E[/ch]     = [ch]F#[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch]     = [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]Asus4[/ch] = [ch]Bsus4[/ch]

Open

[ch]Am7[/ch]   = [ch]Cm7[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch]    = [ch]Cm[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]     = [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch]     = [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]     = [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]C#m[/ch]   = [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]F#m[/ch]   = [ch]Am[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch]     = [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch]     = [ch]Ab[/ch]
[ch]Asus4[/ch] = [ch]Csus4[/ch]

Set8
